title: True Darkness Elementary
description: New dimensions - "Yteria" a dark and gloomy place with new chips and adventures.
body:
Welcome to the Elementary World! You have chance to see True Darkness of this place. Yteria - new dimension, which have terrible Corrupted biomes, or calm swamps and mines. Find new minerals with archeology in Wastelands or create new armor with fire note from Corrupted Place. Or find new ores in Darknite layer in Overworld, which give you another chance take ticket to Yteria. Find Lavender fields or Golden birch forest and calm down with tea.


True Darkness Elementriy - the pretty large mod which add new dimension - homeland of sculk and corrupting. More information how you can find this dimension you can find in game (just go to sleep). In another way you can find Antienite in Darknite layer. Yteria sword or Skrezhal - ways to Yteria.


Special thanks and developer list you can find in Discord server
